\tzpentry{ID3900}{Magnetic Helicity Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3900 introduces Magnetic Helicity Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{M} = T^*(SO(3) \times \mathbb{R}^3) \otimes \mathfrak{u}(1)_{\text{gauge}}$
\]
